title: bartschella glassii subsp. ascensionis
intro: Bartschella glassii subsp. ascensionis is a rare, flowering plant species that is endemic to the island of Ascension in the South Atlantic Ocean. It is a type of succulent plant, often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infections, and may also have a positive effect on digestion and gut health. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infusion for its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and to establish its safety for human consumption.
